title: Most Common Course Pairs
metaData:
{"mysql": ["CREATE TABLE course_completions (
    user_id INT,
    course_id INT,
    course_name VARCHAR(100),
    completion_date DATE,
    course_rating INT
)"], "mssql": ["CREATE TABLE course_completions (
    user_id INT,
    course_id INT,
    course_name VARCHAR(100),
    completion_date DATE,
    course_rating INT
)"], "oraclesql": ["CREATE TABLE course_completions (
    user_id NUMBER,
    course_id NUMBER,
    course_name VARCHAR2(100),
    completion_date DATE,
    course_rating NUMBER
)", "ALTER SESSION SET nls_date_format='YYYY-MM-DD'"], "database": true, "pythondata": ["course_completions = pd.DataFrame({
    "user_id": pd.Series(dtype="int"),
    "course_id": pd.Series(dtype="int"),
    "course_name": pd.Series(dtype="string"),           # corresponds to SQL VARCHAR
    "completion_date": pd.Series(dtype="datetime64[ns]"),  # corresponds to SQL DATE
    "course_rating": pd.Series(dtype="Int64")           # corresponds to SQL INT (nullable)
})"], "postgresql": ["CREATE TABLE if not exists course_completions (
    user_id INT,
    course_id INT,
    course_name VARCHAR(100),
    completion_date DATE,
    course_rating INT
)"], "manual": true, "database_schema": {"course_completions": {"user_id": "INT", "course_id": "INT", "course_name": "VARCHAR(100)", "completion_date": "DATE", "course_rating": "INT"}}}
